sub_pixel_system.notes: No sub-pixel documentation found in available sources

special_mechanics.name: Speed Potion
special_mechanics.description: Temporary speed increase power-up that can be collected during levels

special_mechanics.name: Monster Transformation
special_mechanics.description: Potion allows temporary transformation into a powerful monster form

special_mechanics.name: Neighbor Rescue Mechanic
special_mechanics.description: Top-down action game where players touch neighbors to rescue them; game is lost if all neighbors are killed

tier_notes: Tier 2 - Empirical/Qualitative. Game is a top-down run-and-gun action title, not a traditional platformer. Sources contain no specific physics documentation or movement parameters. Data Crystal provides ROM specifications only (1 MiB ROM, SlowROM, LoROM). TCRF documents unused items, sprites, music, and regional differences but no movement mechanics. Wikipedia gameplay section describes neighbor rescue mechanics and weapons but provides no physics values. No jump mechanics, gravity calculations, or sub-pixel systems documented in available sources.
sources_used: data_crystal - ROM specifications and header information
tcrf - Gameplay mechanics, unused content, regional differences
wikipedia - Gameplay description, development notes, weapons and items
